title: Dark Dimensions 3: Dimensional War
description: Faced with the creatures of darkness of the Dark Dimension, heroes was born!
body:
# Dark Dimensions 3: Dimensional War

[![Download on CurseForge](https://dl.topazdev.fr/stock/images/web/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dark-dimensions-3)
[![Download on Modrinth](https://dl.topazdev.fr/stock/images/web/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dark-dimensions-3)

![Wallpaper](https://spinelle.eu/images/minecraft/modpack/Dark%20Dimensions%203%20Wallpaper.png)


## ••••• English •••••

Faced with the creatures of darkness of the Dark Dimension, heroes was born!

The 3 dimensions of the known world confront each other in an endless war. From which dimension of the overworld, nether or the end will these heroes come to save us from Morgdal the Dark Lord.


## ••••• Français •••••

Face aux créatures des ténèbres de la Dark Dimension, des héros naissent!

Les 3 dimensions du monde connue s'affrontent dans une guerre sans fin. De quel dimension de l'overworld, du nether ou de l'end viendront ces héros pour nous sauver de Morgdal le Seigneur Sombre.


## **Notable mods** / **Mods notables**
- Applied Energistics 2
- Better Archeology
- Better Combat
- Better Nether/End
- Croptopia
- Extra Origins
- Fabric Seasons
- Friends and Foes
- Immersive Portals
- Macaw's mods
- MCA Reborn (MC Comes Alive)
- Origins
- Plasmo Voice
- Sky Villages
- Tectonic
- Terralith
